key_findings.title: Namespace serde bypasses validation
key_findings.note: raw postcard::from_bytes::<Event> accepts 'bad..name' and codex.system.* spoofs. STF rejects today but v1+ system handlers expand the attack surface.

key_findings.title: Light client lacks checkpoint trust bootstrap
key_findings.note: DESIGN §8.4 specifies bundled trusted checkpoint + rotation; current impl starts from ChainTip::genesis with no trust anchor distribution.

key_findings.title: NonceTracker unbounded growth (DoS)
key_findings.note: HashMap<(PeerId, Namespace), HashSet<u64>> retains every nonce ever seen. No per-claimant rate limit despite DESIGN §10 listing one.

key_findings.title: codex-net / codex-rpc / codex-cli unimplemented
key_findings.note: DESIGN §11 crate list and milestone M3-M5 expect wire QUIC + gossipsub + RPC; current code is in-process verifier only.

key_findings.title: codex.system.* event handlers not wired
key_findings.note: Checkpoint / ValidatorSetChange / ValidatorSlash bodies and helpers exist in codex-consensus but no STF-side handler registration path; v0 rejects via UnknownNamespace, not explicit guard.

key_findings.title: StateTree::clone per block
key_findings.note: Atomic rollback uses full StateTree clone. Acceptable v0 toy; M4+ needs incremental / persistent merkle for 10^8 entry target.

key_findings.title: SigningKey cloned into producer + node
key_findings.note: Secret material duplicated in memory. Wrap in Arc<SigningKey> to share.

key_findings.title: README status outdated
key_findings.note: States 'design phase, DESIGN 0.1' while M0-M9 merged and DESIGN is 0.10.
